message:
test(fj-conformance): add 26 oracle tests for Rem (remainder) primitive

Comprehensive conformance tests for Primitive::Rem covering:
- Basic integer remainder (7 % 3 = 1)
- Negative dividend/divisor semantics (truncated remainder)
- Division by zero: integers return 0, floats return NaN
- Float remainder with fractional values
- IEEE 754 special values (infinity, NaN, -0.0)
- 2D and 3D tensor shapes
- Edge cases: zero dividend, scalar, large values, i64::MIN/-1

Verifies the identity: a = (a/b)*b + (a%b) for both integer
and floating-point types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
